test_output_summary: 14 passed in 1.95s (all new tests) + 95 passed in 1.93s (regression suite including existing autobuild and synthetic_report tests)
implementation_notes:
Added validate_requirements_staleness() to synthetic_report.py as a thin wrapper around infer_requirements_from_files() — passes acceptance_criteria=requirements, files_created=source_files, files_modified=[], worktree_path=worktree_path. This reuses all existing size guards, binary file handling, and keyword matching logic.

Added _cumulative_source_files: Set[str] = set() to AutoBuildOrchestrator.__init__ immediately after _cumulative_requirements_addressed, with an explanatory comment referencing TASK-CRV-9618.

Replaced the cumulative merge block in _execute_turn (formerly lines 2217-2237) with staleness-aware logic that: (1) tracks files_created+files_modified into _cumulative_source_files, (2) computes carry_forward = cumulative - current, (3) re-validates carry_forward via validate_requirements_staleness (local import, matching existing pattern), (4) drops stale requirements with debug/info logging, (5) merges current_addressed | validated_carry_forward into cumulative set and report.

The local import of validate_requirements_staleness inside the block follows the existing pattern used for build_synthetic_report and generate_file_existence_promises imports in the same file.

Test file uses a _apply_carry_forward() helper that replicates the merge block logic for unit-testable access without invoking the full turn pipeline. Real-file I/O tests for validate_requirements_staleness use tmp_path directly.
requirements_addressed: Replace cumulative merge block with staleness-aware logic
Create test file tests/unit/test_autobuild_carry_forward.py covering all 6 specified scenarios

Implemented in TestCarryForwardMergesRequirements.test_staleness_drops_requirement_when_file_deleted. Seeds cumulative set with R1, runs turn 2 with validate_requirements_staleness mocked to return [], asserts R1 is absent from cumulative set.
Implemented in TestCarryForwardMergesRequirements.test_staleness_drops_requirement_when_content_changes. Verifies requirement dropped when staleness returns empty (keywords removed).
Implemented in TestCarryForwardMergesRequirements.test_staleness_keeps_requirement_when_file_still_valid. Staleness returns the requirement — asserts it survives in cumulative set.

Implemented in TestCarryForwardMergesRequirements.test_cumulative_source_files_tracked_across_turns. Runs two turns with different file sets, asserts all files from both turns present in _cumulative_source_files.
